review_reason: SuccOrder coverness proof is mathematically blocked. The Lindenbaum construction is non-constructive and GContent(fragmentGSucc(w).world) may differ from GContent(w.world), making coverness unprovable. Additionally, NoMaxOrder cannot be shown because reflexive temporal semantics allow single-point quotients. The plan (implementation-003) needs revision. See handoff document for recommended alternatives.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 partially completed: 14 new lemmas proven (quotient succ/pred infrastructure, GContent/HContent equivalence, mcs_has_F/P_top). Build errors from iteration 1 fixed. Coverness and NoMaxOrder blocked by mathematical issues with Lindenbaum construction and reflexive semantics.

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed build errors from iteration 1 (circular dependency). Added 14 sorry-free lemmas to CanonicalCompleteness.lean including quotient succ/pred, GContent/HContent equivalence, and F/P temporal witnesses. SuccOrder coverness and NoMaxOrder found to be mathematically blocked. Plan revision needed.

errors.message: SuccOrder coverness (succ_le_of_lt) is unprovable: Lindenbaum extensions can add G-formulas not in original GContent, allowing intermediate elements in the quotient. NoMaxOrder unprovable: reflexive temporal semantics allow single-point quotient.
errors.recommendation: Revise plan: Option A (generalize TaskFrame to remove AddCommGroup requirement) or Option B (direct chain with dovetailing using fragmentFSucc)
